convert.title: Convert Lead

errors.microphone_denied: Microphone access was not allowed. Enable microphone access to make calls.

dataGridView.activatePagingFooterHint: Show prev/next controls and a page-size selector under the grid.
dataGridView.inlineEditingActivateHint: Cells become click-to-edit and a save / discard banner appears when you have unsaved changes.

options.upsertHelp: When enabled, rows whose unique fields already exist will overwrite the existing record instead of being skipped as duplicates.
